Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A246
Energy Converter artifact

Triggers: 4 sec

Reaper's Relict
The unit steals 25% of all stats from 4 enemy units with the highest current health for 5 sec and deals 400000 physical damage to them.
The artifact owner increases all stats of 3 allied units with the lowest health by the stolen amount for 5 sec and restores 40% health to them and to themselves. The artifact owner and selected allied units also become immune to silencing effects for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
